title: Parliamentary recognition for Phoenix Early Learners

All Posts Articles Search Parliamentary recognition for Phoenix Early Learners garethbaconmp Mar 4 1 min read Very well deserved recognition in Parliament for the phenomenal team behind Phoenix Early Learners in Petts Wood. After the sudden closure of Crofton Early Learners, staff, carers, parents and volunteers rolled up their sleeves and - at great speed - built something new for local families. Very well done to all at Phoenix Early Learners.
